/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang -Wall  -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -o /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libcgto.dylib -install_name @rpath/libcgto.dylib CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/fill_int2c.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/fill_nr_3c.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/fill_r_3c.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/fill_int2e.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/fill_r_4c.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/ft_ao.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/ft_ao_deriv.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/fill_grids_int2c.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/grid_ao_drv.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/deriv1.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/deriv2.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/nr_ecp.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/nr_ecp_deriv.c.o CMakeFiles/cgto.dir/autocode/auto_eval1.c.o   -L/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/deps/lib  -L/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/deps/lib64  -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/deps/lib -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/deps/lib64 -lcint /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libnp_helper.dylib -framework Accelerate /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libomp.dylib
